content:
Or not. Terrible headache today. Went and got a massage. It mostly fixed it. Now it's the end of the day and I'm feeling fine. Going to try to go to bed early in case it's a lack of sleep kind of thing. 

When having the massage I tried to meditate, focusing on the sensations and noting what images popped up as knots where pushed through. Lots of work stuff. Lots of past conversations and promises both kept and not yet fulfilled. Lots of thinking about timings and efficiencies. 
The masseuse said I had a lot of tension on my left side and in the center of my back. Interesting because it's my left eye that has been twitching. And it was the left side triggering work related thoughts. And I am freshly back from holiday. 
I really should consider throwing it all in. I'm sure it'll be good for me when it finally happens but it will be so tough to lose this job.
